variant.hypothesis: V2-PEAD: on the liquid top-500 A-share universe, entering at the T+1 open after earnings announcements with self-history SUE >= 1.0 (PIT ann_date), holding 50 trading days with a -15% hard stop and a next-quarter SUE <= -1.0 reversal exit, K<=20 equal slots, delivers post-cost same-gross alpha whose bootstrap CI clears zero vs BOTH CSI300 and EW-liquid, full-sample and walk-forward.
variant.causal_logic_label: unestablished — PEAD is literature-robust elsewhere; whether the A-share self-history variant survives T+1 + limit-up + cost is exactly the unproven step
expected_failure_modes: drift consumed by execution friction: T+1 entry lag + limit-up abandonment + 0.40% RT cost leave the CI straddling/below zero (the A-share PEAD attenuation result)
size masquerade: v2c orthogonalized signal loses efficacy => PEAD was a small-cap exposure
regime gate = hindsight fit: v2b no better (or worse WF) than v2a

mechanical_interpretations.single_quarter_E: YTD diff within fiscal year (Q1 = YTD)
mechanical_interpretations.regime_gate: new entries sized x0.3 only; holdings untouched
mechanical_interpretations.size_proxy_v2c: ln(ADV60) — panel has no shares outstanding
mechanical_interpretations.limit_up: open >= pre_close*1.097 abandons the event (no chase)

test_plan.claim_gate: ci_positive_after_cost vs CSI300 AND EW + WF1 + exact-name OOS not sig-neg + 19-gate PASS (unchanged, strict)
